message:
feat(cli): implement full load command with progressive disclosure

- Implement load command with skill resolution by ID/alias
- Add progressive disclosure levels (minimal, overview, standard, full, complete)
- Add SessionQualityRecord struct and DB methods for quality tracking
- Add taint_label field to ExtractedPattern test initializations
- Add transformation.rs for cass transformation pipeline

All tests pass: 213 unit, 11 integration, 8 e2e tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -46,7 +46,7 @@ toml = "0.8"
 rusqlite = { version = "0.32", features = ["bundled", "modern_sqlite"] }
 
 # Search
-tantivy = "0.22"
+tantivy = "0.25"
 
 # Git
 git2 = "0.19"
